## Public Data Checklist

- [ ] I only added public information intended for application use
- [ ] I did not add API keys, secrets, passwords, bearer tokens, private keys, or mnemonics
- [ ] I did not add admin URLs, private endpoints, staging URLs, or internal dashboards
- [ ] I did not add unpublished contract addresses or private operational notes

## Metadata Checklist

- [ ] Links are official and public
- [ ] Logos or assets are official
- [ ] Paths point to valid repository files when using local assets
- [ ] Identifiers and addresses were checked carefully
- [ ] The change is limited in scope and easy to review

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `node scripts/validate-registry.mjs`
- [ ] Validation passed locally

## Additional Context

Add anything maintainers should know.
